entryPoints.purpose: Primary prompt wrapper for starting a new feature specification
responsibilities: Accept slash-command arguments
Inspect before_specify hooks
Delegate execution to speckit.specify agent

entryPoints.purpose: Copilot agent instructions for generating feature specifications
responsibilities: Create numbered feature directories
Generate spec.md from the spec template
Coordinate branch metadata from hooks

Define cross-platform, theming, platform-split, StyleSheet, and test-first principles
Gate planning through constitution checks
Track constitution version 1.1.0

agents.purpose: Agent-mode command implementations for core lifecycle and extension commands
responsibilities: Define command behavior and tool expectations
Expose core lifecycle commands
Expose installed extension commands and selected aliases

prompts.purpose: Slash-command prompt wrappers that route to Copilot agents
responsibilities: Bind slash commands to matching agent files
Provide pre-execution hook checks where command prompts include them

skills.purpose: Command-specific skill instructions for installed Speckit extension workflows
responsibilities: Provide specialized execution protocols for review, validation, cleanup, bugfix, fleet, superb, and related commands
Document business context, components, workflow, command API, data model, dependencies, and quality observations
Reference generated docs through the explicit file list curated in docs/README.md

generatedDocs.purpose: Generated machine-readable Speckit module file index
responsibilities: Classify Speckit files by component role
Record counts, purposes, responsibilities, and dependencies
List installed extensions, commands, aliases, and hook bindings from registry and manifests
Distinguish the 6 bundled core extensions from the 16 community extensions
Stay verifiable by scripts/check-docs.ps1 against .specify/extensions/.registry and extension manifests
Define generated profiles, file indexes, ADRs, and how-tos as separate document classes
List generated root documents explicitly instead of using a broad generated-doc glob
Remain manually curated rather than generated by repoindex

curatedReferences.purpose: Curated ADR for agent-first stack decision
responsibilities: Record human judgement about Spec Kit, Superpowers, Context Engineering, and orchestration layers

curatedReferences.purpose: Curated ADR for skipped extension decisions
responsibilities: Record skipped-extension rationale outside generated registry reference data
